arts.ttl: Freiburg ready to ‘fight’ against Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Julian Schuster has warned Borussia Dortmund his Freiburg players are ready to “fight for the cause” as they look to improve on their defeat against Union Berlin which saw the…

arts.ttl: Report: SC Freiburg in pole position to sign Irie for club record fee
arts.sum: The Breisgauers will be hoping to bring the 19-year-old talent to the Europa-Park Stadion in summer.

arts.ttl: Freiburg set to sign Troyes’ Cyriaque Irié in big-money move
arts.sum: Freiburg are set to sign ESTAC Troyes winger Cyriaque Irié (19), according to a report from L’Équipe. The Burkina Faso forward is expected to complete a big-money move to the Bundesliga…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund and Pittsburgh Steelers announce partnership
arts.sum: To inaugurate the partnership, Dortmund recently hosted a Steelers delegation that included two-time Pro Bowler Miles Killebrew, who had the chance to sample the famous Signal Iduna Park atmosphere and the inimitable Yellow Wall in the Matchday 25 defeat to Augsburg . “I was blown away by my experience at Dortmund,” said Killebrew, whose visit followed that of a BVB delegation featuring former player and long-time Steelers fan Patrick Owomoyela in December last year.

arts.ttl: Dortmund to reignite interest in Mexican midfielder?
arts.sum: Once linked with a move from Ajax to Dortmund, Edson Alvarez could depart his current employers West Ham to don the Black and Yellow.

arts.ttl: Lewandowski’s Reunion: Can Barca Tame Dortmund’s Yellow Wall?
arts.sum: Robert Lewandowski has played in front of the famed Yellow Wall before. He’s heard the roar, soaked in the energy, and thrived under the pressure when he wore black and yellow of Borussia Dortmund himself. But this time, when Barcelona head to the Westfalenstadion for the second leg of their UEFA Champions League quarterfinal tie […] The post Lewandowski’s Reunion: Can Barca Tame Dortmund’s Yellow Wall? first appeared on The Football Faithful.
